title: Oru Naal Oru Naal Lyrics Vaaliba Raja Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Oru naal oru naal
Singer(s):Radhan, Bobo Shashi, Veena Ghantasala
Movie: Vaaliba Rajan
Music: Radhan
Lyrics: Na MuthuKumar

Oru naal oru naal
vennilai kettkum.
Marunaal en nenjam
vinmeenai ketkum

Vazhvile oru kelvikku
vidai rendu illai endru
sonnadhe vandhu sonnadhe
kadhal thaan indru.

En vizhigalil yeno
nulaindhaai yen anbae ?
en uyirnil vandhu kalandhaai, anbae.

Ne kilaigalil poovaai
malarndhaai yen anbae ?
kan edhirinil sarugaai udhirndhaai, anbe.

En theevile
poo pookkum vaasam vandhadhe.
Sollaamaley
azhai alli seludhe.

Kanneerai kadhal endru
kangal sollum neram.
Kaayangalaal en nenjam vegudhe
uravenbadhe pirivenbadhaa
en vaanamaa erigindradhaa.

Vazhvile oru kelvikku
vidai rendu illai endru
sonnadhe vandhu sonnadhe
kadhal thaan indru.

Ingum angum
en ullam aadi sellumey.
Kadhal vandhu
adhai maattri pogudhey.
Kannaadi veettil
indru kallai veesi paarththaen.
Kaaththaadi en kadhal ponadhey.

Vazhvile oru kelvikku
vidai rendu illai endru
sonnadhe vandhu sonnadhe
kadhal thaan indru.

En vizhigalil yeno
nulaindhaai yen anbae ?
en uyirnil vandhu kalandhaai, anbae.

Ne kilaigalil poovaai
malarndhaai yen anbae ?
kan edhirinil sarugaai udhirndhaai, anbe.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Oru Naal Oru Naal conveys the feelings of love and connection, reflecting on how love intertwines with life.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Vaaliba Raja, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic relationship between the lead characters.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Bobo Shashi and Veena Ghantasala, with music composed by Radhan.

When was the song released?

Oru Naal Oru Naal was released on July 1, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Oru Naal Oru Naal from Vaaliba Raja beautifully encapsulates the emotions of love and longing. It features a duet that expresses the deep connection between two lovers, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions. The heartfelt lyrics by Na Muthukumar, combined with the soothing melodies of Radhan, evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth. This track resonates with anyone who has experienced the joys and challenges of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Naal Oru Naal from Vaaliba Raja is a beautiful romantic duet that captures the essence of love and longing. Featuring the melodious voices of Bobo Shashi and Veena Ghantasala, this song is a perfect blend of heartfelt lyrics and enchanting music by Radhan. Dive into the nostalgic vibes of this track that beautifully narrates the emotions of love.
stanzaMeanings: One day, one day, the sky will listen. The next day, my heart will listen to the dreams.
In life, there is no escape from a question, it is said that love is the answer today.
What has happened to my eyes, my love? You have merged into my life, my love.
Why have you blossomed like a flower in my heart, my love? You have melted in front of my eyes, my love.
The fragrance of flowers has come to my home. Without saying anything, it is calling me.
Tears say love when the eyes speak. Is my heart racing because of separation or is my sky falling?
In life, there is no escape from a question, it is said that love is the answer today.
Here and there, my heart is dancing. Love comes and changes that. Today, I looked at the mirror and saw the reflection of my love.
Is my gaze innocent or is love in it?
In life, there is no escape from a question, it is said that love is the answer today.
What has happened to my eyes, my love? You have merged into my life, my love.
Why have you blossomed like a flower in my heart, my love? You have melted in front of my eyes, my love.
